decision_summary: Approve v7.8 Mission Control Coverage Forecast Projection after runtime projection audit is added and release-state audit gates it for 7.8.0+.
rationale: The implementation makes coverage, forecast, adoption proof, evidence completeness, and missing source boundaries visible from canonical artifacts while preserving source-of-truth boundaries.
recommendation: Proceed to release verification and tag v7.8.0 if all gates pass.
expected_user_reaction: Operator can see why Mission Control projection is backed by coverage, adoption, session, context, release, and Archmap evidence.
